error.signature: grpc._channel._InactiveRpcError: StatusCode.UNAVAILABLE: failed to connect to all addresses

verdict.summary: gRPC client cannot reach the server. Server not running, wrong address/port, or TLS/plaintext mismatch.

dead_ends.why_fails: HTTP proxies do not support gRPC's HTTP/2 framing. This makes connection worse, not better.

dead_ends.action: Switch to REST API as workaround
dead_ends.why_fails: Loses gRPC benefits (streaming, protobuf efficiency, code generation). Fix the connection instead.

workarounds.action: Verify server is running and listening on expected port
workarounds.how: grpcurl -plaintext localhost:50051 list  # or ss -tlnp | grep 50051

workarounds.action: Check TLS mismatch: plaintext client vs TLS server or vice versa
workarounds.how: grpc.insecure_channel() for plaintext; grpc.secure_channel(creds) for TLS

workarounds.action: Check DNS resolution and firewall rules for remote servers
